package.name: m_common
package.description: Aggregated common header-only / utility libraries for the ros2_perception workspace. Sub-libraries are exposed as namespaced imported targets: - m_common::mlogger (spdlog-based logging wrapper, header-only) - m_common::m_utils (misc C++17 utilities, static lib) - m_common::rtsp_interface (简易 RTSP 推流：GStreamer gst-rtsp-server)
